__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: HA
__inputs.description: InfluxDB v3 datasource named HA (SQL query language)

title: PV Production
description: Solar panel monitoring dashboard — 26 Tigo TS4 panels across String C (13) and String D (13). Shows daily energy, live power, and connectivity status arranged in physical roof layout.
